title: The Big Cheese Ultra Power Ready-Baited Mouse Trap - Twin Pack - Reusable Mouse Traps For Indoor & Outdoor Use - Humane Mouse-Trap - Easy to Clean Plastic Mice Trap - Prebaited Rodent Trap
features: PROFESSIONAL-GRADE MOUSE TRAP – These ready-baited mouse traps offer a fast and reliable solution for tackling rodent problems indoors or outdoors. Ideal for use in homes, sheds or garages they protect your property against mice while ensuring effective pest control

HIGHLY EFFECTIVE DESIGN – Ready for action! This mouse trap comes ready with a potent, poison-free prune-based attractant, making them safe and efficient. These pre-baited mouse traps deliver rapid results and offer a reliable chemical-free humane solution for controlling pests effectively
REUSABLE – Easy to handle with the securely contained bait, they can be rebaited using The Big Cheese Mouse and Rat Attractant (STV163, sold separately), ensuring continued efficacy

EASY SETUP – Effortlessly activate these mouse traps with a single touch, making them simple to set up and handle. Dispose of pests with a click, avoiding any direct contact. For best results, place traps 2-3 metres apart. Available in twin packs (2-pack) or multi-packs (4-pack) for convenience

ULTRA POWER RODENT CONTROL - Our high-performance Ultra Power products from The Big Cheese will deliver effective results every time - just like the professionals use. As experts in rodent control for over 30 years, you can trust us to take care of your pest problems
description: Product Description Ultra Power Traps from The Big Cheese are performance tested to ensure effective control of mice – just like the traps that professionals use. Ultra Power Traps are also extremely easy to set: simply add bait to the bait well then squeeze the handle to set - the traps are guaranteed to kill mice, or your money back. For best results, place two traps 2-3 metres apart where mice are active. Heavy infestations may require more traps. Manufacturer's Description STV is one of the UK's leading suppliers of pest control products for home and garden use. The Big Cheese range of rodent control products are design to make rodent control easy and to help you live pest-free.
